title: Staging deploy step is unreachable: trigger only fires on main, but step is gated on develop
reasoning: The workflow triggers only on push/PR to 'main' (lines 4-11). The 'Deploy to Staging' step (line 61) is conditioned on github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop', but no trigger fires for the develop branch. This step is dead code and staging will never be deployed to, which is likely unintended.
reproduction: Push a commit to the 'develop' branch. The workflow will not trigger, so the staging deploy step never executes.
recommendation: Add 'develop' to the push branches trigger list (line 5: branches: [main, develop]) so the workflow fires on pushes to develop and the staging step can execute.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are included for this workflow, and GitHub Actions triggers cannot be unit-tested.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a workflow lint step (e.g., actionlint) in CI that verifies all conditional refs in steps are reachable given the declared triggers.
minimumFixScope: Add 'develop' to the push branches array on line 5.
